---
title: "Economics of the Welfare State"
subtitle: "Does globalization reduce social security spending?"
author: "Anton Ebsen"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
---

## Research Question

This project investigates whether globalization reduces social security transfers across OECD welfare states, and whether this effect differs across welfare state regime types.

## Data

- **Countries:** 30+ OECD nations
- **Time period:** 1980–2022
- **Globalization measure:** [KOF Globalization Index](https://kof.ethz.ch/) (Overall, Economic, Social, Political)
- **Outcome:** Social security transfers as % of GDP (CPDS)

## Analysis

The main regression analysis is presented in the [Analysis Notebook](notebooks/02_modern_pipeline.ipynb).

Key results including stepwise robustness checks, specification curves, and marginal effects by welfare regime are documented there.

## Outputs

Regression tables are saved to `outputs/tables/` and specification curve figures to `outputs/figures/`.
